title: Image Editor
description: Image Editor component provides users with a comprehensive set of tools to modify and enhance images. Features such as cropping, resizing, and other editing options allow for detailed adjustments. With its user-friendly interface, it enables real-time modifications, offering a smooth and efficient image editing experience that caters to various needs, from basic touch-ups to more advanced adjustments.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Defines the visual appearance style of the component. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set to true, it disables the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: readonly
props.description: If set to true, user cannot change the value of component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: name
props.description: The name attribute of the component. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value of the component as an array of Blob objects representing the edited image in different formats (JPEG, PNG, WebP). Inherited from MXValueComponent.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text for the component. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Fires each time the component gets focused. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Fires each time the component gets blurred. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emits an event whenever the disabled state of the component changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onValueChanged
events.description: Fires each time the value of the component changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: valueChange
events.description: Deprecated event. Use ngModelChange instead. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: readonlyChange
events.description: Emits an event whenever the readonly state of the component changes. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: validationRulesChange
events.description: Emits an event whenever the validation rules of the component change. Inherited from MXValueComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emits an event whenever the look style of the component changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: onKeyDown
events.description: Fires each time the user presses a key down. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyUp
events.description: Fires each time the user releases a key. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onKeyPress
events.description: Fires each time the user presses a key. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

events.name: onTextChanged
events.description: Fires each time the user changes the text. Inherited from MXInputBaseValueComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Focuses the component.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
focus(): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Registers a touched callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Registers a change callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
registerOnChange(fn: (value: any) => void): void

/**
 * Writes a new value to the element (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param value - The new value to write.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
writeValue(value: any): void

/**
 * Adds a validation rule.
 *
 * @param rule - The validation rule to add.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
addValidationRule(rule: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Removes a validation rule.
 *
 * @param rule - The validation rule to remove.
 * @returns void - No return value.
 */
removeValidationRule(rule: AXFormValidationRule): void

/**
 * Validates the component.
 *
 * @returns Promise<AXValidationSummary> - A promise that resolves to the validation summary.
 */
validate(): Promise<AXValidationSummary>

/**
 * Saves the current edited image and commits the value to the component.
 * If the image has been modified, it commits the image blob array. If no changes were made, it commits null.
 *
 * @returns void - No return value. The edited image is saved and the onValueChanged event is emitted.
 */
save(): void

props.name: showGrid
props.description: Controls whether the grid overlay is displayed on the image editor canvas.

props.name: lockRatio
props.description: Controls whether the aspect ratio is locked during cropping operations.

props.name: src
props.description: The source URL or path of the image to be loaded and edited.
